calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KCOX; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Continued To Feb-24-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to FEB-24-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Regarding counsel request to vacate sanctions - request to vacate sanctions must be by motion in Dept. 206. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2014 Continued To Nov-25-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to NOV-25-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JAMES J. McBRIDE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)
